hero.tagline: The Coast. The World. Your Investment.
hero.subtitle: Luxury property management on the Sorrento Peninsula, Capri and Amalfi Coast

home.title: Riviera Gulf Property Management
home.subtitle: Complete property management service for those who want to enhance their assets
home.chi_siamo_desc: Riviera Gulf specializes in maximizing real estate assets on the Sorrento Peninsula, Capri, Amalfi Coast and Naples. We operate through two complementary divisions covering the entire investment lifecycle.
home.mercati_desc: Presence in the best locations: Sorrento Peninsula, Capri, Amalfi Coast, Naples

villaLimonaia.title: Villa Limonaia
villaLimonaia.subtitle: Piano di Sorrento
villaLimonaia.descrizione_breve: An elegant historic building in the heart of Piano di Sorrento
villaLimonaia.descrizione: Villa Limonaia is a charming historic building nestled in the heart of Piano di Sorrento, just a 3-minute walk from the main square and 10 minutes from the sea elevator. The property features 7 independent rooms with private en-suite bathrooms, ideal for couples, families and small groups.
villaLimonaia.disponibilita: Available from July to October, short stays welcome
villaLimonaia.spazi_comuni_desc: Stunning traditional Sorrentine lemon grove, furnished garden, private parking and shared kitchen for breakfast

residenzaManuela.title: Residenza Manuela
residenzaManuela.subtitle: Capri
residenzaManuela.descrizione_breve: Exclusive apartment for 6 guests, just minutes from the center of Capri
residenzaManuela.descrizione: Residenza Manuela is a bright and spacious apartment located at Via Cercola 7, just 3 minutes' walk from Via Camerelle — Capri's iconic shopping and lifestyle street — set in one of the island's most peaceful and green areas.
residenzaManuela.disponibilita: Available from July to October, short stays welcome

proprietari.title: Partnership with Riviera Gulf
proprietari.subtitle: Transform your property into a profitable asset
proprietari.intro: Complete property management service for those who want to enhance their assets on the Sorrento Peninsula, Capri, Amalfi Coast and Naples.
proprietari.fee_desc: We earn only when you earn. Complete alignment of interests.
proprietari.costi_desc: No fixed costs, no risk for the property owner. The model pays for itself through results.
proprietari.assistenza_desc: Multilingual support always active. Response under 2 minutes in 10+ languages.
proprietari.golive_desc: Operational in record time. First booking expected within 7–21 days.
proprietari.mandato_desc: Turnkey contract. Definition of fees, excluded dates and objectives.
proprietari.setup_desc: Professional photo survey. Dynamic pricing and multi-channel calendar configuration.
proprietari.pubblicazione_desc: Listings published on Airbnb, Booking and Vrbo in 14 days. SEO optimized.
proprietari.gestione_desc: 24/7 guest communication. Coordination of check-ins, cleaning and maintenance.
proprietari.pagamento_desc: Bank transfer by the 10th of the month. Monthly KPI report. 24/7 portal access.
proprietari.marketing_desc: Presence on Airbnb, Booking and Vrbo with multilingual copywriting and professional photos.
proprietari.revenue_desc: Daily dynamic pricing optimized based on demand and local competitors.
proprietari.calendari_desc: Automatic multi-channel synchronization with zero double bookings.
proprietari.supporto_desc: Fast response in 10+ languages for guest requests and issues.
proprietari.checkin_desc: Personal guest welcome, key handover and property briefing.
proprietari.housekeeping_desc: Professional post-checkout cleaning, linen management and documented photo checklist.
proprietari.adempimenti_desc: CIN management, 21% tax regime, guest communication and accommodation tax.
proprietari.report_desc: Complete monthly KPI report and 24/7 portal access from your smartphone.
proprietari.capri_desc: Top Italy for ADR · 6 min from Piazzetta · 88% international guests
proprietari.amalfi_desc: Top 4% Italy for revenue · 94% international guests · 259 nights/year
proprietari.napoli_desc: 8,100+ active listings · Growing market · 66% international guests
proprietari.nessun_impegno: No commitment. No fixed costs. Results only.
proprietari.form_invio: By submitting the form you agree to receive information from Riviera Gulf
